chunks.text: When I compare the members of my family
each one is interesting in a different way.
My brother is much taller than me.
My sister is younger than me.
In my family, Pochi runs faster than anyone else.
Today 's dinner tasted better than yesterday 's.
My mother tried a new recipe.
The book I am reading now is more interesting than the old one.
Reading is more important than watching TV.
Spring days are warmer and longer than fall days.
So every year, I wait for spring to come.
